helpful: Provisioned petition full text and questions-presented extract — the QPs alone were nearly dispositive for this cell
Statpack originating-circuit, relist, and per-Term fee-class cuts gave a clean anchor-and-adjust path
gaps: fedcourts query has no originating-court or fee-class filter, so CAFC-specific priors could not be pulled directly; --era modern silently returned zero rows (era labels are decade-style like '2020s')
A statpack cut for pro se vs counseled petitions would sharpen exactly this kind of cell — the paid-class rate overstates pro se paid filings
The statpack lacks the 'Segment base rate by salience band' table the prompt points to; per-band rates were not available for anchoring
notes: Docket signals (SG waiver with no call for response, long-conference distribution, zero relists) plus non-certworthy QPs made this a far-left-tail cell; retrieval stayed well under budget.
